blended.narrative: Stevens Pass is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 14 inches of snowfall of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 1,420 ft. Looking ahead, 23 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 18" of heavy snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tomorrow: 6" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 36.4" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 29" over the past week. Current depth: 62".
